summary: Student Vibe - A College Notes Sharing + AI Study Helper web application with premium subscription model
architectural_notes: Web application built with React frontend
Authentication through Internet Identity (supports Google, Apple, Microsoft)
Payment processing via Stripe API for premium subscriptions
AI integration for study helper features (summaries, quizzes, viva prep)
Admin system with role-based access control for user management
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Replace the logo with the graduation cap emblem from the uploaded image (Screenshot_20260224_003807_Chrome.jpg > logo.dim_200x200.png)

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication using Internet Identity that supports Google, Apple, and Microsoft sign-in options
Create notes upload functionality allowing students to upload college notes with metadata (subject, topic, semester, college)
Build notes browsing and discovery interface where students can search and filter shared notes by subject, topic, semester, and college
Implement AI summary generation feature that creates concise summaries from uploaded notes content
Build quiz generator that automatically creates multiple-choice and short-answer questions based on notes content
Create viva questions feature that generates oral exam preparation questions from study materials
Implement premium subscription system with Stripe payment integration starting at ₹69, unlocking advanced AI features and unlimited uploads
Build study group features enabling students to create collaborative study groups, share notes within groups, and discuss topics
Design and implement a modern, student-friendly UI with blue-purple gradient theme, rounded cards, clean typography, and intuitive navigation optimized for both desktop and mobile browsers

Create a cohesive visual theme with a futuristic EdTech aesthetic: soft neon gradient lighting, floating UI cards, modern typography, and a vibrant yet minimal design language that feels professional and student-oriented

Create an animated splash screen that displays on app startup with the Student Vibe logo, using CSS animations or React animation libraries. The animation should play once when the app loads, then fade out to reveal the main application interface.
Display authenticated user's profile information (name, email, college) in the app header or navigation area, accessible after login
Replace the placeholder Student Vibe logo with the uploaded tech head circuit brain logo image (Screenshot_20250223_215353_Chrome.jpg) in the app header, splash screen, and any other logo locations
Create a dedicated student profile page route at /profile where authenticated users can view and edit their complete profile information including name, email, and college details
Add a navigation link to the profile page in the Layout header navigation menu, positioned near the UserProfileDisplay component
Update the profile page UI to include form fields for the new customizable profile properties (bio, year of study, department) with appropriate input types and validation
Create React Query hooks (useGetAdminUserProfile, useGetAllUsers, useSetUserPremiumStatus, useSetUserAdminStatus, useSearchUsersByEmail) in the frontend to interact with the new admin backend methods
Create an AdminDashboardPage component at route /admin that displays a user management interface with search, user list, and action buttons for premium and admin access control
Add Admin link to the Layout navigation menu that routes to /admin, visible only to users with admin privileges

Replace the current Student Vibe logo (Screenshot_20250223_215353_Chrome.jpg) with the newly uploaded graduation cap emblem image (Screenshot_20260224_003807_Chrome.jpg) in all logo locations: app header (Layout component), splash screen (SplashScreen component), and any other places where the logo is displayed

Replace the current logo image file with the newly uploaded graduation cap emblem image (Screenshot_20260224_003807_Chrome.jpg) in the frontend assets directory (frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png)
Update all logo image references in Layout.tsx to use the graduation cap emblem image path (frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png)
Update the logo image reference in SplashScreen.tsx to use the graduation cap emblem image path (frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png)

new_feature_requests.summary: College notes upload and sharing functionality
AI-powered study features (summaries, quiz generation, viva questions)
User authentication via Internet Identity with Google/Apple/Microsoft sign-in support
Premium subscription integration with Stripe starting at ₹69
Modern React UI with blue-purple gradient theme and clean student-friendly design
Student group features for collaborative study
Add animated logo on app startup/splash screen
Add user profile functionality to app login
Replace placeholder logo with user-provided image
Student profile page where users can view and customize their profile information

Enhance the backend UserProfile type to support optional additional customizable fields such as bio, year of study, and department, updating saveCallerUserProfile and getCallerUserProfile methods accordingly
Build admin system with dashboard to manage users, grant/revoke premium access, search users by email, and assign admin roles
Add an isAdmin boolean field to the UserProfile type in the backend main actor to track admin users
Create backend method getAdminUserProfile that returns the calling user's profile with admin status verification
Create backend method getAllUsers that returns a list of all user profiles, restricted to admin users only
Create backend method setUserPremiumStatus that accepts a principal and boolean, allowing admins to grant or revoke premium access for any user
Create backend method setUserAdminStatus that accepts a principal and boolean, allowing existing admins to grant or revoke admin privileges for any user
Create backend method searchUsersByEmail that accepts an email search query string and returns matching user profiles, restricted to admin users only
Update migration.mo to handle the new isAdmin field when migrating existing UserProfile records, defaulting to false
Replace logo with user-uploaded image
